name: Applesauce Cinnamon Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Coat 12 medium muffin cups with vegetable oil or line with paper baking liners.
3. In a medium bowl, combine oat bran cereal, flour, cinnamon, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. In a large bowl, mix together applesauce, honey, oil, egg, and vanilla extract.
5. Stir in the dry ingredients until well combined.
6. Fold in walnuts.
7. Fill prepared muffin cups nearly full with batter.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Serve warm.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE + 1/2 FRUIT EXCHANGE.
CHO: 23g; PRO: 3g; FAT: 7g; CAL: 159; Low-sodium diets: Omit salt.
